prompt:
Use case: precise-object-edit
Asset type: primary game title lockup for a fantasy tactics RPG
Primary request: brighten only the lower word TACTICS so it reads clearly over dark atmospheric backdrops
Subject: the existing approved RENATIONS TACTICS logo with TACTICS as the only edited element
Style/medium: preserve the exact existing logo design, distressed serif treatment, and transparent-background runtime use
Composition/framing: preserve the exact centered layout, scale, spacing, silhouette, and ornament placement
Lighting/mood: make TACTICS brighter with pale ivory or restrained antique-gold value contrast while keeping the overall mark solemn and martial
Constraints: change only the TACTICS letters inside the masked region; keep the exact text TACTICS; preserve RENATIONS, the arch, the red divider line, the lower plate, the side ornaments, all outlines, all shadows, and the transparent background; do not redesign the logo
Avoid: changing the main wordmark, changing the layout, recoloring the full logo, soft glow haze, added scenery, mockup background, font substitution, extra ornament
